headline: Understand your symptoms, and what helps
caption:
Understanding why you hurt is part of how you heal. When the brain learns that symptoms are not a sign of damage, the alarm starts to settle.

The Neurowaze Recovery Hub explains neuroplastic symptoms and the science behind them in plain language. The Resources area gives you activities and exercises to practise between sessions.

It is there for anyone living with chronic pain, fibromyalgia, IBS, tinnitus, fatigue or long COVID who wants to understand their symptoms and do something about them.

Knowledge is part of the treatment. Explore the Recovery Hub at https://neurowaze.health

#ChronicPain #Neuroplasticity #Fibromyalgia #IBS #Tinnitus #LongCovid #MindBody #PainEducation #PainRecovery #Neurowaze
first_comment: Explore the Recovery Hub and the Resources area: https://neurowaze.health
body:
Understand why you hurt, in plain language.

Then practise activities and exercises that help the nervous system settle.
